Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
from PIL import Image

src = Image.open\('/mnt/c/Users/gezer/Desktop/pax-portal/assets/logo.png'\).convert\('RGBA'\)

canvas_size = 1024
padding = int\(canvas_size * 0.10\)   # %10 padding her kenardan
logo_size  = canvas_size - padding * 2   # 819 px

# Orijinal oranı koruyarak sığdır
src.thumbnail\(\(logo_size, logo_size\), Image.LANCZOS\)

# Beyaz arka plan + merkeze yerleştir
canvas = Image.new\('RGBA', \(canvas_size, canvas_size\), \(255, 255, 255, 255\)\)
x = \(canvas_size - src.width\)  // 2
y = \(canvas_size - src.height\) // 2
canvas.paste\(src, \(x, y\), src\)

out = canvas.convert\('RGB'\)   # App store PNG için RGB yeterli
out.save\('/mnt/c/Users/gezer/Desktop/pax-portal/assets/icon.png', 'PNG', optimize=True\)
print\(f"Kaydedildi: 1024x1024  \(logo {src.width}x{src.height}, offset {x},{y}\)"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
from PIL import Image

src = Image.open\('/mnt/c/Users/gezer/Desktop/pax-portal/assets/Pax_Portal_Saydam.png'\).convert\('RGBA'\)
print\(f"Orijinal: {src.width}x{src.height}"\)

canvas_size = 1024
padding = int\(canvas_size * 0.08\)  # %8 her kenardan
max_w = canvas_size - padding * 2
max_h = canvas_size - padding * 2

# Oranı koruyarak sığdır
ratio = min\(max_w / src.width, max_h / src.height\)
new_w = int\(src.width * ratio\)
new_h = int\(src.height * ratio\)
logo = src.resize\(\(new_w, new_h\), Image.LANCZOS\)

# Koyu arka plan \(uygulama teması ile uyumlu\)
canvas = Image.new\('RGBA', \(canvas_size, canvas_size\), \(13, 13, 13, 255\)\)

x = \(canvas_size - new_w\) // 2
y = \(canvas_size - new_h\) // 2
canvas.paste\(logo, \(x, y\), logo\)

canvas.convert\('RGB'\).save\('/mnt/c/Users/gezer/Desktop/pax-portal/assets/icon.png', 'PNG', optimize=True\)
print\(f"Kaydedildi: 1024x1024  \(logo {new_w}x{new_h}, offset {x},{y}\)"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
from PIL import Image

src = Image.open\('/mnt/c/Users/gezer/Desktop/pax-portal/assets/logo.png'\).convert\('RGBA'\)

canvas_size = 1024
padding = int\(canvas_size * 0.12\)
max_size = canvas_size - padding * 2

ratio = min\(max_size / src.width, max_size / src.height\)
new_w = int\(src.width * ratio\)
new_h = int\(src.height * ratio\)
logo = src.resize\(\(new_w, new_h\), Image.LANCZOS\)

# Siyah arka plan
canvas = Image.new\('RGBA', \(canvas_size, canvas_size\), \(0, 0, 0, 255\)\)
x = \(canvas_size - new_w\) // 2
y = \(canvas_size - new_h\) // 2
canvas.paste\(logo, \(x, y\), logo\)

canvas.convert\('RGB'\).save\('/mnt/c/Users/gezer/Desktop/pax-portal/assets/icon.png', 'PNG', optimize=True\)
print\(f"Kaydedildi: 1024x1024, siyah arka plan"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import csv

input_path = '/mnt/c/Users/gezer/Downloads/data_safety_export.csv'
output_path = '/mnt/c/Users/gezer/Downloads/data_safety_export_filled.csv'

# App data collection reality:
# - Name \(displayName\): collected, required, App functionality + Account management
# - Email: collected, required, App functionality + Account management
# - User Account ID \(Firebase UID\): collected, required, App functionality + Account management
# - Approx + Precise Location: collected \(geofence check-in/out\), required, App functionality ONLY
#   NOT shared, NOT ephemeral \(stored in Firestore\)
# - Device ID \(push notification token\): collected, required, App functionality
#   NOT shared, NOT ephemeral
# No financial, no messages, no photos, no health, no contacts, no calendar

# Build a map of \(question_id, response_id\) -> desired value
desired = {}

# --- Top-level already set correctly ---
desired[\('PSL_DATA_COLLECTION_COLLECTS_PERSONAL_DATA', ''\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_COLLECTION_ENCRYPTED_IN_TRANSIT', ''\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_SUPPORTED_ACCOUNT_CREATION_METHODS', 'PSL_ACM_USER_ID_PASSWORD'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_SUPPORT_DATA_DELETION_BY_USER', 'DATA_DELETION_YES'\)] = 'true'

# Data type checkboxes
desired[\('PSL_DATA_TYPES_PERSONAL', 'PSL_NAME'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_TYPES_PERSONAL', 'PSL_EMAIL'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_TYPES_PERSONAL', 'PSL_USER_ACCOUNT'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_TYPES_LOCATION', 'PSL_APPROX_LOCATION'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_TYPES_LOCATION', 'PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_TYPES_IDENTIFIERS', 'PSL_DEVICE_ID'\)] = 'true'

# PSL_NAME usage
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_NAME:PSL_DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_AND_SHARING', 'PSL_DATA_USAGE_ONLY_COLLECTED'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_NAME:DATA_USAGE_USER_CONTROL', 'PSL_DATA_USAGE_USER_CONTROL_REQUIRED'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_NAME:DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_PURPOSE', 'PSL_APP_FUNCTIONALITY'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_NAME:DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_PURPOSE', 'PSL_ACCOUNT_MANAGEMENT'\)] = 'true'

# PSL_EMAIL usage
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_EMAIL:PSL_DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_AND_SHARING', 'PSL_DATA_USAGE_ONLY_COLLECTED'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_EMAIL:DATA_USAGE_USER_CONTROL', 'PSL_DATA_USAGE_USER_CONTROL_REQUIRED'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_EMAIL:DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_PURPOSE', 'PSL_APP_FUNCTIONALITY'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_EMAIL:DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_PURPOSE', 'PSL_ACCOUNT_MANAGEMENT'\)] = 'true'

# PSL_USER_ACCOUNT usage
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_USER_ACCOUNT:PSL_DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_AND_SHARING', 'PSL_DATA_USAGE_ONLY_COLLECTED'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_USER_ACCOUNT:DATA_USAGE_USER_CONTROL', 'PSL_DATA_USAGE_USER_CONTROL_REQUIRED'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_USER_ACCOUNT:DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_PURPOSE', 'PSL_APP_FUNCTIONALITY'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_USER_ACCOUNT:DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_PURPOSE', 'PSL_ACCOUNT_MANAGEMENT'\)] = 'true'

# PSL_APPROX_LOCATION usage — only app functionality, not shared, not ephemeral
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_APPROX_LOCATION:PSL_DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_AND_SHARING', 'PSL_DATA_USAGE_ONLY_COLLECTED'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_APPROX_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_USER_CONTROL', 'PSL_DATA_USAGE_USER_CONTROL_REQUIRED'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_APPROX_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_PURPOSE', 'PSL_APP_FUNCTIONALITY'\)] = 'true'
# Explicitly CLEAR incorrect pre-filled values:
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_APPROX_LOCATION:PSL_DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_AND_SHARING', 'PSL_DATA_USAGE_ONLY_SHARED'\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_APPROX_LOCATION:PSL_DATA_USAGE_EPHEMERAL', ''\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_APPROX_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_PURPOSE', 'PSL_ANALYTICS'\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_APPROX_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_PURPOSE', 'PSL_DEVELOPER_COMMUNICATIONS'\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_APPROX_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_PURPOSE', 'PSL_FRAUD_PREVENTION_SECURITY'\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_APPROX_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_PURPOSE', 'PSL_PERSONALIZATION'\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_APPROX_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_PURPOSE', 'PSL_ACCOUNT_MANAGEMENT'\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_APPROX_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_SHARING_PURPOSE', 'PSL_ANALYTICS'\)] = ''

# PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION usage — only app functionality, not shared, not ephemeral
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION:PSL_DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_AND_SHARING', 'PSL_DATA_USAGE_ONLY_COLLECTED'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_USER_CONTROL', 'PSL_DATA_USAGE_USER_CONTROL_REQUIRED'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_PURPOSE', 'PSL_APP_FUNCTIONALITY'\)] = 'true'
# Explicitly CLEAR incorrect pre-filled values:
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION:PSL_DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_AND_SHARING', 'PSL_DATA_USAGE_ONLY_SHARED'\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION:PSL_DATA_USAGE_EPHEMERAL', ''\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_USER_CONTROL', 'PSL_DATA_USAGE_USER_CONTROL_OPTIONAL'\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_PURPOSE', 'PSL_ANALYTICS'\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_PURPOSE', 'PSL_DEVELOPER_COMMUNICATIONS'\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_PURPOSE', 'PSL_FRAUD_PREVENTION_SECURITY'\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_PURPOSE', 'PSL_PERSONALIZATION'\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_PURPOSE', 'PSL_ACCOUNT_MANAGEMENT'\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_SHARING_PURPOSE', 'PSL_APP_FUNCTIONALITY'\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_SHARING_PURPOSE', 'PSL_ANALYTICS'\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_SHARING_PURPOSE', 'PSL_DEVELOPER_COMMUNICATIONS'\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_SHARING_PURPOSE', 'PSL_FRAUD_PREVENTION_SECURITY'\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_SHARING_PURPOSE', 'PSL_ADVERTISING'\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_SHARING_PURPOSE', 'PSL_PERSONALIZATION'\)] = ''
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_PRECISE_LOCATION:DATA_USAGE_SHARING_PURPOSE', 'PSL_ACCOUNT_MANAGEMENT'\)] = ''

# PSL_DEVICE_ID usage
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_DEVICE_ID:PSL_DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_AND_SHARING', 'PSL_DATA_USAGE_ONLY_COLLECTED'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_DEVICE_ID:DATA_USAGE_USER_CONTROL', 'PSL_DATA_USAGE_USER_CONTROL_REQUIRED'\)] = 'true'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_USAGE_RESPONSES:PSL_DEVICE_ID:DATA_USAGE_COLLECTION_PURPOSE', 'PSL_APP_FUNCTIONALITY'\)] = 'true'

# URLs \(already in original\)
desired[\('PSL_ACCOUNT_DELETION_URL', ''\)] = 'https://paxmedya.com.tr/hesap-silme/'
desired[\('PSL_DATA_DELETION_URL', ''\)] = 'https://paxmedya.com.tr/hesap-silme/'

with open\(input_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    reader = csv.reader\(f\)
    rows = list\(reader\)

header = rows[0]
output_rows = [header]

for row in rows[1:]:
    new_row = row[:]
    if len\(row\) >= 3:
        key = \(row[0], row[1]\)
        if key in desired:
            new_row[2] = desired[key]
    output_rows.append\(new_row\)

with open\(output_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8', newline=''\) as f:
    writer = csv.writer\(f, quoting=csv.QUOTE_MINIMAL\)
    writer.writerows\(output_rows\)

print\("Done! Rows with true values:"\)
for r in output_rows[1:]:
    if len\(r\) >= 3 and r[2] == 'true':
        print\(f"  [{r[0]}] | [{r[1]}]"\)
        
print\("\\nRows with URL values:"\)
for r in output_rows[1:]:
    if len\(r\) >= 3 and r[2].startswith\('http'\):
        print\(f"  [{r[0]}] = {r[2]}"\)
EOF)
